Emerald Gym Leaders & Elite Four

	As usual, in Emerald you battle your way through 8 gyms, each specializing in a particular type. Following that you take on the Elite Four and the Champion. Although the gyms are the same as Ruby/Sapphire, most of the leaders' teams in Emerald are different.

### Gym Leaders
[Roxanne](#gym-1) (Rustboro City)[Brawly](#gym-2) (Dewford Town)[Wattson](#gym-3) (Mauville City)[Flannery](#gym-4) (Lavaridge Town)[Norman](#gym-5) (Petalburg City)[Winona](#gym-6) (Fortree City)[Tate & Liza](#gym-7) (Mossdeep City)[Juan](#gym-8) (Sootopolis City)
### Elite Four
[Sidney](#elite4-1)[Phoebe](#elite4-2)[Glacia](#elite4-3)[Drake](#elite4-4)[Wallace](#champion-5)
